## Overview

Salesforce Public Sector Solutions is a configured vertical of the Salesforce platform (Service Cloud, Experience Cloud, Flow, Platform) tailored for government case management, licensing, benefits and grants. In the UK, Salesforce is the substrate of **Cabinet Office Spotlight** (cross-government automated due-diligence tool) and has significant installed bases across UKHSA (COVID-era deployment with IBM), DWP, HMRC and the wider Grants Management Function. The AppExchange offers **GovGrants** (by SpendEdge) as a purpose-built grants-management application on the platform.

## Products & Services

- **Salesforce Public Sector Solutions** — managed package / blueprint covering case management, licensing, benefits, grants.
- **GovGrants (AppExchange)** — purpose-built grant-management app on the Salesforce platform.
- **Spotlight (Cabinet Office)** — cross-government due-diligence tool built on Salesforce; could be federated with.
- **Nonprofit Success Pack (NPSP)** — heritage grant-management data model.
- Partner implementations via Deloitte, Accenture, IBM, Capgemini, PwC, Silversoft, Acutedge and others.

## Pricing Model

- Per-user subscription, tiered by edition (Enterprise / Unlimited / Government Cloud).
- Typical Year 1 all-in for a UK public-sector grants deployment at this scale: £500k–£2m+ including implementation partner fees (industry range, not a disclosed DfT/MCA contract).
- Government Cloud hosting carries a premium.

## UK Government Presence

- **G-Cloud 14 listed**: multiple Salesforce and partner listings.
- **UK data centres**: yes — Salesforce Hyperforce UK region; Government Cloud UK.
- Known UK Gov references: Cabinet Office Spotlight, UKHSA (COVID response with IBM), Civil Service / departments (per Salesforce UK case studies).

## Strengths

- Deep integration with Cabinet Office Grants Function tooling (Spotlight, GGIS).
- Mature case-management substrate with large implementer ecosystem.
- Proven at UK Gov scale under emergency conditions (UKHSA).
- Strong API, identity, and audit capabilities.
- Government Cloud edition supports UK data residency and HMG compliance.

## Weaknesses

- Per-user economics escalate sharply at scale across DfT + 9 MCAs + assessors.
- Vendor lock-in risk; bespoke Apex / LWC customisations reduce portability.
- Not GOV.UK Design System native; Experience Cloud portal needs significant theming.
- Implementation partner dependence — ongoing cost tail.
- Not Green Book / TAG aware — same custom build requirement as Dynamics.

## Projects Referenced In

- DfT Transforming City Regions Funding (discovery, 2026-04-20)
